policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-log-05 - Workspace-context access mode'. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+Log+Analytics+Workspace#IncidentremediationLogAnalyticsWorkspace#drcp-log-05 .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP Log Analytics Workspace Disable Workspace context access
policyDefinition.description: This policy disables the Log Analytics Workspace Workspace context access mode.
